name: X-Golf Georgia
about: X-Golf Alpharetta is an indoor golf simulator venue offering state-of-the-art technology for play, training, and entertainment. It features 7 simulators equipped with camera systems, infrared lasers, and impact sensors for accurate ball and club tracking. The venue operates as a hybrid sports bar and golf facility, with a fully stocked bar, food menu, and 13 flat-screen TVs, making it suitable for both serious practice and social gatherings. Pricing is per bay, per hour, accommodating up to 6 people per simulator, with rates varying by day and time.
why_golfers_like_it: Unparalleled accuracy and realism from advanced camera and laser tracking systems
Flexible pricing model allowing groups of up to 6 per bay
Full bar and food options available for a complete entertainment experience
PGA-certified professional instruction for skill development

food_and_drink.notes: Food menu available with tasty bites, though BYOB is not permitted as venue has its own kitchen
Fully stocked bar with 12 beer taps available

simulator_hardware: X-Golf simulators (camera systems, infrared lasers, impact sensors)
simulator_software: Advanced gaming software, V1 Pro Golf

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: No, the venue has right/left/teens/kids clubs available for rental.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No, BYOB is not permitted as the venue has a fully stocked bar and kitchen with food available.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Generally 1 hour per player for 18 holes. Groups may need additional time depending on size and skill level.

faq.question: Is it kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue welcomes children of all ages and offers junior lessons.
